title: Arista Networks Appoints New CFO
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET), an industry leader in data-driven, client-to-cloud networking for large data center, campus and routing environments, today announced the appointment of Chantelle Breithaupt as the company's CFO effective February 2024. Breithaupt comes to Arista with over 25 years of global financial roles. She will be joining the leadership team, having served as senior vice president and CFO of Aspen Technology (NASDAQ: AZPN).
